items.headline: With voting over, here’s how the All-Star teams are selected

news_items.headline: Yanks place Rodón on IL with elbow inflammation
news_items.summary: The Yankees placed lefty Carlos Rodón on the 15-day IL on Friday with elbow inflammation.

news_items.headline: Cubs recall Pomeranz from Triple-A, option Wicks
news_items.summary: The Cubs recalled left-hander Drew Pomeranz from Triple-A Iowa before Friday's game against the Cardinals and optioned lefty Jordan Wicks to the farm club.

news_items.headline: Braves sign OF McCutchen to minor league deal
news_items.summary: The Braves signed past NL MVP outfielder Andrew McCutchen to a minor league contract on Friday in their ongoing search for a veteran who can provide offensive help.

news_items.headline: Padres' Vasquez taken to hospital after fainting
news_items.summary: Padres right-hander Randy Vasquez was in stable condition after fainting following his abbreviated start Thursday night against the Dodgers, manager Craig Stammen said.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski's ASG status in doubt due to schedule
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski is in line to start the Sunday before the All-Star break, which would make him ineligible to pitch in the All-Star Game two nights later.

news_items.headline: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
news_items.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

news_items.headline: Carlos Rodón injury update: Yankees lefty placed on IL with elbow inflammation
news_items.summary: Carlos Rodón was placed on the 15-day injured list, another setback for a rotation that lost fellow lefty Max Fried with an elbow bone bruise.

news_items.headline: Midseason rankings for MLB's biggest awards: Can P...
news_items.summary: With the All-Star break approaching, it's time to look at the leaders for MVP, Cy Young and more.

news_items.headline: Winners and losers for June -- and what we're watc...
news_items.summary: We break down who ruled the past month and what will rock the weeks ahead as baseball enters its most jam-packed month.

news_items.headline: Yankees Mailbag: Aiming for a deadline makeover
news_items.summary: There’s gotta be some change on this Yankees roster, but will it be impactful enough?

news_items.headline: Jorge Mateo returns to lineup in Mets opener
news_items.summary: Hello July! Goodbye struggles… we hope

news_items.headline: Cincinnati Reds vs. Baltimore Orioles – Trevor Rogers vs. Brady Singer
news_items.summary: The Cincinnati Reds look to make a run prior to the All Star break.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals at Chicago Cubs Friday Afternoon
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will travel to Wrigley Field for an All-American 4th of July weekend as they’ll challenge their arch-rivals, the Chicago Cubs. Andre Pallante will try to give the Cardinals another strong start. He’ll be facing LHP David Peterson. First pitch is scheduled for 3:15pm central time and the game TV broadcast will […]

news_items.headline: All 15 MLB broadcasts on July 5 to be televised on NBC's Peacock for 'Star-Spangled Sunday'
news_items.summary: Mets-Braves and Padres-Dodgers will be broadcast on NBC, in addition to Peacock.

news_items.headline: Yankees injuries: Rodón on IL, Grisham and McMahon activated
news_items.summary: Two players return to the active roster, but a valuable pitcher heads to the IL himself.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani faces a Padres team that can’t stop allowing runs
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani makes only his second start at home in over a month as the Dodgers host the Padres
